introplatformer: ^Well if it isn't our prized pupil.
^Yes, right, cause I’ve been gone forever, I know. Could you guys make this quick, please?
^You seem quite eager to return to this… Kazumi of yours.
^Am I right in assuming that you haven’t abandoned your academics?
^It would not be the first time such suspicions have arisen.
^Your artistic pursuits continue to threaten your academic potential.
^No, I haven’t abandoned either of those things— that’s why I’m here.
^I’m ready for whatever tasks you have.
^Well then, let us proceed. First, demonstrate that you have overcome your initial missteps in the previous practice tests;
^eliminate one enemy. Use [RMB] or [J] to attack.
firsttaskdone: ^Wonderful! But that was much too simple, wasn’t it?
^As a small reward, you may now dash using [RMB] or [SHIFT].
^For your next task, demonstrate that your notes have been fully committed to memory;
^traverse upwards and return to me with the notes.
secondtaskdone: ^You have certainly proven your diligence, but one final task remains.
^Prove that you are prepared for whatever obstacles may present themselves on the test;
^The path is situated on the left side of the lab.
^You will be granted permission to spend time with the girl thereafter.
^Before you go, try attacking while jumping to wall-jump. This skill will certainly be of use to you.
lasttaskdone: ^I should not have doubted your continued tenacity.
^Perhaps your work ethic has not faltered, though your constant thoughts of the girl remain a concern.
^From junior high until now, I’ve never once fallen below the top five—across every subject.
^I’ve been consistent, and yet you’re still so worried.
^Naturally so. Your indifference to all worldly matters—with the exception of art—has long served as the backbone of your academic prowess.
^Something as significant as a cherished friend is an inevitable cause for unease, is it not?
^As my last gift to you, you may also now double jump.
^Anyway, I hope the girl makes for good company.
